title: ferray-numpy-interop: Arrow FromArrow consumes the PrimitiveArray — should accept reference
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

FromArrow::into_ferray(self) takes ownership of the PrimitiveArray. For cases where the Arrow array is borrowed (e.g., from a RecordBatch column reference), users must clone the Arrow array before converting. The method copies data anyway (values.iter().copied().collect()), so it could accept &PrimitiveArray<T::ArrowType> instead of consuming it. Rename to from_arrow(&self) and accept a reference.
